---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown Garden Instructions

This file applies when editing Markdown garden files.

- Preserve Obsidian wikilinks to existing notes.
- Do not create wikilinks to deferred candidate concepts.
- Keep raw imports intact; repair or enrich normalized packet records instead.
- Keep trusted `wiki/` notes readable as current knowledge.
- Record semantic history in packet reviews, suggested patches, `log.md`, and Git.
- Update `index.md` or the relevant map file when adding durable notes.
- Prefer protocol terms from `CONTEXT.md`.
- Follow templates in `schema/templates/` for trusted notes.
